message: Node started: Analyze the relationship between the initial tree and the final tree. For each node in the final tree, identify which node (or set of nodes) in the initial tree corresponds to it. Specifically, determine which siblings in the initial tree must be merged to form a single node in the final tree. A node in the final tree is formed by merging a set of siblings in the initial tree if they share the same parent and are part of the same 'target' node in the final tree. Identify these sets of nodes to be merged.
